latest.rule_counts_meaning: occurrences across all scanned Dockerfiles; a single repo can contribute multiple occurrences
latest.rule_rates_meaning: repos_with_rule divided by repo_count; each rule counted at most once per repo
latest.method: High-star public GitHub repositories were sorted by stargazers; root Dockerfile was fetched from raw.githubusercontent.com; each Dockerfile text was submitted once to Apex agent-dockerfile-lint via signed Agent Passport headers; only decisions, counts, rule IDs, file hashes, target refs, and receipt metadata are stored. Rule counts are occurrences; rule rates are repo-level prevalence (repos_with_rule / repo_count).
